message:
fix(config): support NTM_PROJECTS_BASE env var override for projects_base default

Allow provisioning tools (e.g. ACFS) to set the default projects directory
via the NTM_PROJECTS_BASE environment variable, avoiding conflicts with
the compiled default (~/ntm_Dev on Linux). Explicit config.toml settings
still take priority over this env var.

Closes #93

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
